Home / Projects / Hardware / WS2812B LED Matrix

WS2812B LED Matrix

16x16 WS2812B LED matrix on Raspberry Pi using SPI/DMA.

Overview

This section covers building and programming a 16x16 WS2812B LED matrix driven by a Raspberry Pi over SPI using DMA. Topics include serpentine/zigzag PCB layout remapping, integrating the rpi-ws281x C library, and implementing animations like a Tetris-style falling color effect.

Articles

  • 16x16 WS2812B LED Matrix — Hardware Setup

    PCB design and wiring for a Raspberry Pi-driven 16x16 WS2812B LED matrix.

    Raspberry PiWS2812BSPIhardware
  • Tetris-Style Falling Color Animation

    Implementing a falling color animation on the WS2812B LED matrix in C.

    Raspberry PianimationCWS2812B
